recommendations.title: Rambo III

recommendations.title: The NeverEnding Story III
recommendations.overview: A young boy must restore order when a group of bullies steal the magical book that acts as a portal between Earth and the imaginary world of Fantasia.

recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Crime, Romance, Thriller, Drama

recommendations.title: Savior
recommendations.overview: A hardened mercenary in the Foreign Legion begins to find his own humanity when confronted with atrocities during the fighting in Bosnia.

recommendations.title: The Flying Deuces
recommendations.overview: Ollie falls in love with a woman. When he discovers she's already married, he unsuccessfully attempts suicide but he and Stan then decide to join the Foreign Legion to get away from their troubles. When they’re arrested for soon trying to desert the

recommendations.title: The Great Escape
recommendations.overview: The Nazis, exasperated at the number of escapes from their prison camps by a relatively small number of Allied prisoners, relocate them to a high-security 'escape-proof' camp to sit out the remainder of the war. Undaunted, the prisoners plan one of t

recommendations.title: Sgt. Stubby: An American Hero
recommendations.overview: The true story of the most decorated dog in American military history - Sgt. Stubby - and the enduring bonds he forged with his brothers-in-arms in the trenches of World War I.

recommendations.title: Tae Guk Gi: The Brotherhood of War
recommendations.overview: When two brothers are forced to fight in the Korean War, the elder decides to take the riskiest missions if it will help shield the younger from battle.

recommendations.title: 303 Squadron
recommendations.overview: After the fall of the September Campaign of 1939, two Polish pilots are forced to fight for their nation in foreign battlefronts.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.
